data.title: Consumer Tech News (Dec 2-Dec 6): FBI Advises To Adopt Encrypted Messaging Apps, Elon Musk Completed First Starlink Satellite Constellation & More
data.description: FBI advises using encrypted messaging apps to safeguard communications; Gamers spend more time watching gaming content than playing; Disney+ expands with ESPN integration; Amazon unveils AI chip clusters to enhance performance for partners.

data.title: Trump on Assad's Fall: Putin 'Was Not Interested In Protecting Him Any Longer'
data.description: President-elect Trump weighed in on the fall of Bashar Assad after a rebel group seized control of Damascus, ending five decades of Assad family rule.

data.title: Intel, UnitedHealth And Rocket Lab Are Among Top 11 Large Cap Losers Last Week (Dec 2-Dec 6): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
data.description: 11 worst performing large-cap stocks last week: TPL, MCHP, INTC, KB, GWRE, TOST, UNH, ODFL, HAL, PKX, RKLB. Reasons include OPEC decision, CEO retirements, and conflicts.
